topic: Viewing and Editing Processed Employee Salaries
summary: This topic explains how to view processed salaries for a given month and make specific adjustments to an individual employee's salary structure, such as adding deductions like advance recovery.
steps: A list of employees with processed salaries for that month will be displayed, showing Employee ID, Name, Department, Designation, Payable Days, Gross Salary, Deduction Amount, and Paid Salary.
To view or edit a specific employee's salary, click the 'View' option corresponding to that employee.
The complete salary structure for the employee will open.
Select 'Advance Recovery' from the available deduction heads.
Enter the 'Amount' (e.g., 11,000). The system will automatically recalculate Gross Salary, Deduction, and Paid Salary.
Enter 'Remarks' describing the change made (e.g., 'Advance recovery change').
Click 'Save'. A pop-up will confirm that the changes have been saved.
The changes will be reflected when you view the salary again.
business_rules: Any modifications made to a processed salary require 'Remarks' to be entered and saved for the changes to take effect and be recorded.
important_notes: The 'Salary Summary Month Wise' module is used for viewing and editing *processed* monthly salaries, not the underlying salary contracts.
Changes made here are specific to the selected month's salary and do not alter the employee's assigned salary contract.
You can also adjust basic pay or add other earning/deduction heads for the current month's salary through this interface.
questions: How can I view an employee's processed salary for a particular month?
What is the procedure to deduct an advance from an employee's monthly salary?
Why are 'Remarks' required when making changes to a processed salary?
Is it possible to modify an employee's basic salary after it has been processed for the month?
How do I add a one-time deduction to an employee's salary?
related_topics: Creating and Managing Earning and Deduction Heads
